title: SignalConfig
description: Per-channel TOML config for the signal-cli subprocess adapter. The adapter spawns `signal-cli -a <account> jsonRpc` and communicates via JSON-RPC over stdio.

signal_cli_path.description: Path to the signal-cli executable. Defaults to looking up `signal-cli` on $PATH.

account.description: Signal account identifier (typically the phone number registered with signal-cli, e.g. `+15551234567`). Passed as `-a <account>`.

send_timeout_secs.description: Per-request timeout (seconds) for outbound send_message JSON-RPC round-trips.
